function.name: network_scan
function.description: Scan a network target for live hosts and open ports. Accepts a single host, IP range, or CIDR block. Returns a structured list of discovered hosts with their open ports and service versions.

target.description: Host, IP, or CIDR to scan (e.g. '192.168.1.0/24', '10.0.0.1', 'hostname.local').

ports.description: Comma-separated port list or range to probe (e.g. '22,80,443' or '1-1024'). Defaults to common ports.

timeout.description: Per-host timeout in seconds. Defaults to 5.
